mapper.select: SELECT comment_id, qna_id, content, writer, writer_id, created_at, updated_at FROM qna_comment WHERE qna_id = #{qnaId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qna_comment (qna_id, content, writer, writer_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{qnaId}, #{content}, #{writer}, #{writerId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE qna_comment SET content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
